name: Character.AI
one_liner: A consumer AI platform that lets users create and interact with AI-powered characters through open-ended, persona-driven conversations.

ambiguities: Headcount figures vary significantly across sources (95–277); Tracxn cites 277 as of April 2026, PitchBook cites 130, GetLatka cites 225, and TexAu cites 95 as of Dec 2024 — Tracxn's most recent figure used.
HQ listed as Menlo Park by most sources; GetLatka lists Palo Alto — Menlo Park used as primary per majority of sources.
Seed round amount cited as $43M across most sources; total raised of $193M is consistent across PitchBook, Tracxn, and GetLatka.
Post-founders departure (late 2024), company shifted from proprietary LLMs to open-source models (Meta, DeepSeek); tech stack partially inferred from job postings.
As of August 2025, company was reportedly evaluating a potential sale or new large funding round at valuation above $1B — no new round confirmed as of research date.
